sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48707" key="qh/ragros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θήραγρ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄγρα</etym>) <sense id="n48707.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for catching wild beasts</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">game</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέδη</foreign> Ion Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope> </bibl>: name of a hound, dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.304</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pisand.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
